title: Version prompt artifacts
description: Templates and prompt configuration are versioned and diffable so a prompt change is reviewable and tied to its eval result.
body: Use when a prompt template or its parameters change. Do not edit a prompt string inline with no record, and avoid shipping prompt changes that cannot be diffed or rolled back. Actions: store templates as versioned artifacts, record the prompt version with each evaluation and each production response, and review prompt diffs like code. Validation signals include a prompt version stamped on stored responses and a diff that shows exactly what changed between versions. Risk boundary: an untracked prompt change can silently regress quality with no way to attribute or roll back; require versioning before a prompt change ships.
